label: Ablation, interventions & causal analysis

node.label: Ablation, interventions & causal analysis
node.definition: Ablation and causal analysis intervene on data, modules, activations, prompts, or training choices to estimate which components actually cause observed behavior.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Ablation, interventions & causal analysis is to connect Causal inference, Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics to downstream capabilities including Mechanistic interpretability & circuit analysis, Formal verification of models.
examples: substrate for Mechanistic interpretability & circuit analysis
substrate for Formal verification of models
limitations: Coverage is necessarily incomplete: measured proxies, policies, and test suites cannot enumerate every deployment context or adversary. Its direct dependencies include Causal inference, Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics.

dependencies.rationale: Ablation, interventions & causal analysis measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Causal inference.

Ablation, interventions & causal analysis measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Statistics & experimental design.
